name: My Spinakopita s f August 93
recipeIngredient: 1 cup cottage cheese, or ricotta or feta cheese
2 tablespoons chopped chives or spring onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the cheese in a colander.
2. Chop the spinach finely.
3. Cook the onion in oil until transparent.
4. Stir in the spinach.
5. Season with salt, pepper, nutmeg, and cumin. Let cool.
6. Stir in the cheese.
7. Place 1 sheet of phyllo on a surface, brush with oil, place the second sheet on top, baste with oil, place the third sheet on top.
8. Arrange half the filling in a row about 2 inches from the edge of the phyllo sheet.
9. Roll up the dough.
10. Repeat the procedure with the other 3 sheets.
11. Place the roll on a cookie sheet, mark 2 to 2 1/2 inch intervals.
12. Baste the top with oil.
13. Bake at 375°F (preheated) for 20 to 25 minutes.
